recommendations.title: Night of the Creeps

recommendations.title: American Pie Presents: Beta House
recommendations.overview: Erik, Ryan, and Cooze start college and pledge the Beta House fraternity, presided over by none other than legendary Dwight Stifler. But chaos ensues when a fraternity of geeks threatens to stop the debauchery and the Betas have to make a stand for t

recommendations.title: Pledge
recommendations.overview: Three friends pledge a fraternity that's deadly serious about its secret rituals, turning their rush into a race for survival.

recommendations.title: Funeral Parade of Roses
recommendations.overview: In 1960s Tokyo, Gonda owns a bar in which the gay, cross-dresser, and trans scenes meet. Gonda is in a relationship with the madam of the bar, Leda. As the younger Eddie starts a passionate affair with Gonda, she ignites the jealousy of Leda, unaware

recommendations.title: Animal House
recommendations.overview: At a 1962 College, Dean Vernon Wormer is determined to expel the entire Delta Tau Chi Fraternity, but those troublemakers have other plans for him.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
recommendations.overview: After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the Gecko brothers head south to a seedy Mexican bar to hide out in safety, unaware of its notorious vampire clientele.

recommendations.title: Hell Night
recommendations.overview: As an initiation rite into Alpha Sigma Rho fraternity, four pledges must spend a night in Garth Manor, twelve years to the day after the previous resident murdered his entire family.

recommendations.title: Vampyres
recommendations.overview: A duo of bisexual female vampires prey on passing motorists, whom they seduce and murder in the English countryside.

recommendations.title: Shithouse
recommendations.overview: Lonely college freshman Alex has closed himself off from his peers, who all appear to have this whole "college thing" figured out. But everything changes one night when Alex takes a leap and attends a party at Shithouse - a legendary party fraternity
